name: carteira-investimentos
description: Carteira de investimentos com controle de ativos, aportes, dividendos, metas e sincronizacao Firebase.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['index.html','manifest.json','sw.js']; for (const f of files) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { throw new Error('Missing file: ' + f); } } console.log('Build OK: static app validated.');"
scripts.test:modern: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/modern-base.test.js tests/modern-host.test.js tests/modern-host-source.test.js tests/modern-reports-bridge.test.js tests/modern-reports-integration.test.js tests/modern-reports-refresh.test.js tests/legacy-assets-active-wallet-host.test.js tests/readonly-report-session-context.test.js
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:finance && npm run test:persistence && npm run test:backup-restore && npm run test:load && npm run test:roundtrip && npm run test:extraction && npm run test:ui && npm run test:performance
